en: King Solomon was king over all Israel,
zh: 所羅門王作了全以色列的王。

en: and these were his high officials: Azariah the son of Zadok was the priest;
zh: 以下這些人是他的官員：撒督的兒子亞撒利雅作祭司；

en: Elihoreph and Ahijah the sons of Shisha were secretaries; Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder;
zh: 示沙的兩個兒子以利何烈和亞希亞作書記；亞希律的兒子約沙法作史官；

en: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was in command of the army; Zadok and Abiathar were priests;
zh: 耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅統領軍隊；撒督和亞比亞他作祭司；

en: Azariah the son of Nathan was over the officers; Zabud the son of Nathan was priest and king's friend;
zh: 拿單的兒子亞撒利雅作幕僚長；拿單的兒子撒布得作祭司，他也是王的朋友；

en: Ahishar was in charge of the palace; and Adoniram the son of Abda was in charge of the forced labor.
zh: 亞希煞作家宰；亞比大的兒子亞多尼蘭掌管服勞役的人。

en: Solomon had twelve officers over all Israel, who provided food for the king and his household. Each man had to make provision for one month in the year.
zh: 所羅門在全以色列立了十二個官員；他們為王和王家供應食物，每人每年供應一個月。

en: These were their names: Ben-hur, in the hill country of Ephraim;
zh: 以下是他們的名字：便．戶珥在以法蓮山地；

en: Ben-deker, in Makaz, Shaalbim, Beth-shemesh, and Elonbeth-hanan;
zh: 便．底甲在瑪迦斯、沙賓、伯．示麥、以倫和伯．哈南；

en: Ben-hesed, in Arubboth (to him belonged Socoh and all the land of Hepher);
zh: 便．希悉在亞魯泊，梭哥和希弗全地是屬他管理的；

en: Ben-abinadab, in all Naphath-dor (he had Taphath the daughter of Solomon as his wife);
zh: 便．亞比拿達在拿法多珥全境，他娶了所羅門的女兒他法為妻；

en: Baana the son of Ahilud, in Taanach, Megiddo, and all Beth-shean that is beside Zarethan below Jezreel, and from Beth-shean to Abel-meholah, as far as the other side of Jokmeam;
zh: 亞希律的兒子巴拿在他納、米吉多和那靠近撒利但、在耶斯列下邊的伯．善全地，由伯．善到亞伯．米何拉，再到約克米暗之外；

en: Ben-geber, in Ramoth-gilead (he had the villages of Jair the son of Manasseh, which are in Gilead, and he had the region of Argob, which is in Bashan, sixty great cities with walls and bronze bars);
zh: 便．基列在基列的拉末；瑪拿西的子孫睚珥在基列的村落是屬他的，巴珊的亞珥歌伯地的六十座有城牆和銅閂的大城也是屬他的。

en: Ahinadab the son of Iddo, in Mahanaim;
zh: 易多的兒子亞希拿達在瑪哈念；

en: Ahimaaz, in Naphtali (he had taken Basemath the daughter of Solomon as his wife);
zh: 亞希瑪斯在拿弗他利，他娶了所羅門的女兒巴實抹為妻；

en: Baana the son of Hushai, in Asher and Bealoth;
zh: 戶篩的兒子巴拿在亞設和亞錄；

en: Jehoshaphat the son of Paruah, in Issachar;
zh: 帕路亞的兒子約沙法在以薩迦；

en: Shimei the son of Ela, in Benjamin;
zh: 以拉的兒子示每在便雅憫；

en: Geber the son of Uri, in the land of Gilead, the country of Sihon king of the Amorites and of Og king of Bashan. And there was one governor who was over the land.
zh: 烏利的兒子基別在基列地，就是從前亞摩利王西宏和巴珊王噩之地。這地只有一個官員管理。

en: Judah and Israel were as many as the sand by the sea. They ate and drank and were happy.
zh: 猶大人和以色列人很多，像海邊的沙那樣多；他們都吃喝、快樂。

en: Solomon ruled over all the kingdoms from the Euphrates to the land of the Philistines and to the border of Egypt. They brought tribute and served Solomon all the days of his life.
zh: 所羅門統治列國，從大河到非利士地，直到埃及的邊界。這些國家，在所羅門在世的日子，都向他進貢，服事他。

en: Solomon's provision for one day was thirty cors of fine flour and sixty cors of meal,
zh: 所羅門每天的食物是細麵粉五千公升、粗麵粉一萬公升、

en: ten fat oxen, and twenty pasture-fed cattle, a hundred sheep, besides deer, gazelles, roebucks, and fattened fowl.
zh: 肥牛十頭、草場的牛二十頭、羊一百隻，此外還有鹿、羚羊、麅子和肥禽。

en: For he had dominion over all the region west of the Euphrates from Tiphsah to Gaza, over all the kings west of the Euphrates. And he had peace on all sides around him.
zh: 因為所羅門統治大河西邊，從提弗薩直到迦薩的全境和大河西邊的列王，所以他的四境都平安無事。

en: And Judah and Israel lived in safety, from Dan even to Beersheba, every man under his vine and under his fig tree, all the days of Solomon.
zh: 所羅門在世的日子，猶大和以色列人從但到別是巴，都各在自己的葡萄樹下和無花果樹下安然居住。

en: Solomon also had 40,000 stalls of horses for his chariots, and 12,000 horsemen.
zh: 所羅門有套車的馬四萬匹和騎兵一萬二千人。

en: And those officers supplied provisions for King Solomon, and for all who came to King Solomon's table, each one in his month. They let nothing be lacking.
zh: 那些官員分別每月供應所羅門王和所有與所羅門王一同坐席的人的食物，從沒有缺少。

en: Barley also and straw for the horses and swift steeds they brought to the place where it was required, each according to his duty.
zh: 他們也各按各的職分供給拉車的馬和快馬吃的大麥和乾草，送到指定的地方。

en: And God gave Solomon wisdom and understanding beyond measure, and breadth of mind like the sand on the seashore,
zh: 神賜給所羅門智慧、極大的聰明和廣大的心，好像海邊的沙那樣無限無量。

en: so that Solomon's wisdom surpassed the wisdom of all the people of the east and all the wisdom of Egypt.
zh: 所羅門的智慧大過所有東方人的智慧，大過埃及人的一切智慧。

en: For he was wiser than all other men, wiser than Ethan the Ezrahite, and Heman, Calcol, and Darda, the sons of Mahol, and his fame was in all the surrounding nations.
zh: 他比萬人都有智慧，勝過以斯拉人以探和瑪曷的三個兒子希幔、甲各、達大的智慧。他的名聲傳遍了四周列國。

en: He also spoke 3,000 proverbs, and his songs were 1,005.
zh: 他說了箴言三千句，他的詩歌有一千零五首；

en: He spoke of trees, from the cedar that is in Lebanon to the hyssop that grows out of the wall. He spoke also of beasts, and of birds, and of reptiles, and of fish.
zh: 他講論草木，從黎巴嫩的香柏木到生長在牆上的牛膝草；他也講論走獸、飛禽、爬行的動物和魚類。

en: And people of all nations came to hear the wisdom of Solomon, and from all the kings of the earth, who had heard of his wisdom.
zh: 萬族之中和地上列王之中，聽聞所羅門的智慧的，都有人來聽所羅門的智慧。
